mapper.select: select placement_key, host, port, db_name, secret_ref, pool_max_size, enabled, description, updated_at, updated_by from batch.business_shard_catalog order by placement_key
select placement_key from batch.business_shard_catalog where enabled = true
mapper.insert: insert into batch.business_shard_catalog ( placement_key, host, port, db_name, secret_ref, pool_max_size, enabled, description, updated_by ) values ( #{p.placementKey}, #{p.host}, #{p.port}, #{p.dbName}, #{p.secretRef}, #{p.poolMaxSize}, #{p.enabled}, #{p.description}, #{p.operator} ) on conflict (placement_key) do update set host = #{p.host}, port = #{p.port}, db_name = #{p.dbName}, secret_ref = #{p.secretRef}, pool_max_size = #{p.poolMaxSize}, enabled = #{p.enabled}, description = #{p.description}, updated_by = #{p.operator}, updated_at = current_timestamp
